title: AI Run Entry
description: One line in working/ai-runs.jsonl — a JSON Lines file where each line is one AI model invocation. Appended to by every content-producing skill. Consumed by the Phase B dashboard for spend tracking and by the smoke test for skill-hygiene validation.

skill.description: Which skill made this AI call

proposal_id.description: Proposal slug (matches the proposals/<slug>/ directory name)

job_type.description: Categorization of what the AI call was for (aligns with v2 doc's job taxonomy)

prompt_version.description: Optional version tag of the prompt used (for reproducibility)

input_tokens_estimate.description: Estimated input tokens. Phase A: best-effort estimate. Phase B+: real counts when available from SDK.

cost_estimate_usd.description: Estimated USD cost based on current model pricing. Derived from tokens * rate.

cache_hit.description: Whether this invocation hit the prompt cache (Phase E+ when caching is wired in)

inputs.description: List of input files or identifiers the call operated on (for audit / fingerprint)

notes.description: Free-form notes. Used in Phase A before real token counts are available to record approximations or context.
